title: quercus baolamensis
intro: Quercus baolamensis, also known as the Baolam Oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and bark of the Baolam Oak have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus baolamensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against cardiovascular diseases. The herbal preparations of the Baolam Oak typically involve making tea or infusions from its leaves and bark, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
